hero.description: Aastha for Women provides counseling, training, and community support to women in need. Together, we can create a safer and more equitable world.

aboutPreview.title: Who We Are
aboutPreview.description: Aastha for Women is a non-profit organization dedicated to empowering women through counseling, skill development, and community building. We believe every woman has the strength to overcome challenges when given the right support.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: Comprehensive support services for women at every stage
programs.pageSubtitle: Comprehensive support designed to uplift and empower
programs.counselingDesc: Professional mental health and emotional support for women facing domestic violence, trauma, and life challenges.
programs.preMaritalDesc: Guidance and preparation for women approaching marriage, covering communication, expectations, and healthy relationships.
programs.skillTrainingDesc: Vocational training and skill development programs to help women achieve financial independence.
programs.individualCounselingDesc: One-on-one sessions with trained professionals for women dealing with trauma, domestic violence, anxiety, and depression.
programs.groupTherapyDesc: Supportive group sessions where women can share experiences and heal together in a safe environment.
programs.preMaritalFullDesc: Comprehensive guidance for women approaching marriage — communication skills, setting expectations, and understanding rights.
programs.vocationalTrainingDesc: Skill-building programs in tailoring, computer literacy, beautician courses, and more for financial independence.
programs.legalAwarenessDesc: Workshops on women's legal rights, domestic violence laws, and how to access legal aid and support services.
programs.leadershipDevDesc: Empowering women to become community leaders through confidence-building, public speaking, and mentorship programs.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.subtitle: Making a difference, one life at a time
impact.pageSubtitle: Numbers and stories that show the change we're creating
impact.rekhaStory: After facing years of domestic abuse, Rekha came to Aastha broken and hopeless. Through six months of counseling and vocational training, she learned tailoring and now runs a small business supporting her family.
impact.fatimaStory: Fatima was married at 16 and had no education. Through our literacy and computer training programs, she earned a certificate and now works as an office assistant — the first woman in her family to hold a job.
impact.sunitaStory: Our pre-marital counseling gave Sunita the confidence to communicate openly with her partner. A year into marriage, she credits the program for her healthy, equal relationship.

testimonials.title: Stories of Hope
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from the women whose lives have been transformed
testimonials.quote1: Aastha gave me the courage to rebuild my life. The counselors were so patient and kind.
testimonials.quote2: The skill training helped me start my own tailoring business. I now support my two children independently.
testimonials.quote3: Volunteering here has been the most fulfilling experience. Every day I see women finding their strength.

about.title: About Aastha for Women
about.subtitle: Our journey of empowering women and building resilient communities
about.description: Aastha for Women was founded with a simple yet powerful belief — every woman deserves access to safety, support, and the opportunity to thrive. Based in New Delhi, India, we work at the grassroots level to provide counseling, education, and community support to women from all walks of life.
about.visionDesc: A world where every woman lives with dignity, free from violence, and empowered to make her own choices.
about.missionDesc: To provide holistic support to women through professional counseling, skill development, and community networks that foster resilience and independence.
about.founderStory: "Growing up, I witnessed the struggles women in my community faced silently. After completing my studies in social work, I knew I had to act. Aastha for Women started as a small counseling center in 2015 and has since grown into a comprehensive support organization serving thousands of women across Delhi NCR. Our dream is to reach every woman who needs help, no matter where she is."

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Join us at our upcoming programs and community events

donate.title: Support Our Cause
donate.subtitle: Your contribution can change a woman's life forever
donate.todoPayment: Replace this UPI QR code and UPI ID with actual payment details. This is a placeholder for development purposes only.
donate.taxNote: All donations are tax-deductible under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act. You will receive a receipt via email after your donation is processed.
donate.otherWaysDesc: Bank Transfer, Cheque, or in-person at our center.

getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.subtitle: Join us in building a world where every woman thrives
getInvolved.volunteerSubtitle: Find a role that matches your skills and passion
getInvolved.fieldVolunteerDesc: Help organize events, conduct outreach, and support women directly in their communities.
getInvolved.campaignerDesc: Spread awareness about women's rights and our programs through social media and grassroots campaigns.
getInvolved.mentorDesc: Share your expertise in counseling, legal aid, or career guidance to support women in transition.
getInvolved.partnerDesc: We welcome partnerships with corporates, educational institutions, and other NGOs. Together, we can amplify our impact and reach more women in need.
getInvolved.todoForm: Replace with actual Google Form link for volunteer sign-up.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach out anytime.
contact.whatsappDesc: Get quick assistance via WhatsApp. We typically respond within 30 minutes.

footer.tagline: Empowering women through counseling, education, and community support.
